purpose: Minimal machine-readable current context and routing for agents.

read_policy.history_read_condition: Only read logs when explicitly asked for history, debugging a repeated known error, regression archaeology, or old audit details.

context_policy.errors_log: Append to .agents/logs/errors.jsonl only for sanitized reusable root-cause/fix knowledge.
context_policy.routine_work: Do not update docs/logs for routine actions.

subagents.input: Minimal goal, allowed files/packages, forbidden actions, output schema.
subagents.output: Technical schema-only: status, findings file:line issue fix, changed_files/tests, residual_risks.
subagents.owner: Main agent owns decisions, integration, code quality and user-facing report.

progress.current_focus: Security/scale hardening plan R1-R10 completed on fastlife_dev; final plan prompt was removed and commit/push was requested by the user.
active_priorities: Repeat live YooKassa smoke for payment.succeeded, payment.canceled and refund.succeeded through dashboard-delivered webhooks.
Finish production deployment shape for static Mini App, cmd/api, cmd/worker, dedicated payment webhook runtime, TLS/proxy headers and service units.
Run credential-bound smoke for real OpenAI, DeepInfra and VK delivery before external users.
Verify edge/proxy body-size limits before public reference uploads.
Implement lot/FIFO attribution before automatic, partial or already-spent credit refunds.

decisions: Baseline started on fastlife_dev; no code behavior changes before baseline report.
No .agents/logs files read; no reusable sanitized error entry needed.
Step 2 closed R1 by replacing raw runtime error log attrs with bounded error_code attrs and class-based provider failure messages.
Step 3 closed R2 with app-level and nginx payment redirect limits before repeated DB lookups; opaque redirect tokens deferred because they require a broader payment-link/schema flow.
Step 3 added production fail-closed validation for VK top-up public redirect base; R8 remains tracked until direct fallback behavior is reviewed explicitly.
Step 4 closed R3 with per-process limiter bucket TTL, bounded incremental eviction and a hard bucket cap; local limiter remains a fallback behind edge/shared limits.
Step 5 discovered commands.raw_text retention as a separate user-text retention risk; do not mix it into R4 VK callback payload patch.
Step 5 closed R4 by storing metadata-only VK inbound payloads for new events and adding batched two-phase legacy inbound payload redaction in maintenance.

Step 6 closed R5 by replacing Mini App upload multipart buffering with streaming multipart parsing, adding pre-read Content-Length/concurrency rejects, lowering default upload concurrency to 4 and aligning nginx /miniapp/artifacts body limit.

Step 7 closed R7 by keeping critical VK dialog mode in existing Redis DialogState with TTL while bounding best-effort process-local activeMenus/dialog cache by 1h TTL and 10000-peer caps; no Redis menu payload or payment/provider state was introduced.

Step 8 closed R6 by classifying antispam dependency-error actions, blocking generation job candidates with an explicit degraded decision, allowing cheap control commands, and completing denied/degraded VK events even if the user-facing antispam response send fails.

Step 9 closed R9 by verifying loadtest config mock-only guards and adding k6 script-level refusal for known production hosts unless K6_ALLOW_PRODUCTION_LIVE_SMOKE=true is deliberately set for a separate human-approved smoke.
Plan file updated to add explicit residual steps for R8 VK top-up provider URL fallback and R10 commands.raw_text retention before final review.

Step 10 closed R8 by removing VK bot fallback from server-owned redirect links to provider confirmation URLs; missing/invalid redirect base now returns a safe unavailable-payment notice and new top-up intent creation is skipped.
Step 11 closed R10 by adding command raw-text retention schema, config, maintenance dry-run/status visibility and idempotent redaction that skips commands linked to unfinished jobs.

Step 12 final review removed docs/SECURITY_SCALE_HARDENING_PLAN_PROMPT.md, found no temporary backup/build junk files, and kept new paymentredirect package, VK local-state test and command retention migrations as implementation artifacts.

baseline.next_priority: None for this hardening plan; prepare commit and push as requested

risk_register.R1_logging_leakage: closed in Step 2; logs use bounded error_code and provider failure text is class-based
risk_register.R2_payment_redirect_public_lookup: closed in Step 3; repeated valid-looking probes are rate-limited before unbounded DB lookups and nginx has edge limit
risk_register.R3_rate_limiter_unbounded_buckets: closed in Step 4; local limiter has idle TTL, bounded sweep and hard bucket cap
risk_register.R4_vk_payload_retention: closed in Step 5; new VK inbound payloads are metadata-only and legacy VK payload redaction is batched, idempotent and visible via retention dry-run/status
risk_register.R5_miniapp_upload_memory: closed in Step 6; Mini App upload memory is bounded by streaming multipart parsing, pre-read oversize rejection, per-process concurrency 4 and nginx exact-route body limit
risk_register.R6_antispam_degradation: closed in Step 8; antispam dependency errors block generation job candidates with explicit degraded UX, cheap control commands continue, and denied/degraded VK events complete without retry amplification if response delivery fails
risk_register.R7_vk_bot_ui_state_ttl: closed in Step 7; local VK UI maps have TTL eviction and hard peer caps, stale callbacks fall back without new menu sends, and shared Redis state remains limited to dialog mode strings with TTL
risk_register.R8_vk_topup_direct_provider_url: closed in Step 10; VK bot payment creation/reuse output uses server-owned redirect links or a safe unavailable-payment notice, and missing/invalid redirect base no longer falls back to provider confirmation links
risk_register.R9_safe_load_security_verification: closed in Step 9; loadtest runtime config is mock-only, checked-in k6 scripts refuse known production hosts by default, and verification covered target risk paths plus full Go suite and compose config
risk_register.R10_command_raw_text_retention: closed in Step 11; command raw text is user_content with TTL config, migration-backed expiry/redaction fields, dry-run/status visibility, idempotent redaction and unfinished-job guardrails

post_merge_fix_plan.summary: Output moderation, refund recovery, provider retry, billing guards, webhook trust, surface idempotency, artifact size limits and CI/prod context hardening completed.

security_invariants: No secrets, full launch params, prompt bodies, private artifact URLs, raw PII or provider credentials in docs/logs/chat.
No provider calls from VK handlers, Mini App BFF or cmd/api.
Do not weaken auth, signature checks, moderation, billing, idempotency, TLS or webhook trust.
